criteria.name: Solver Initialization
criteria.requirement: Solver initializes without errors on target grid
criteria.evidence: NS2D_QTT_Native constructed with 2048×512 grid, shift MPOs built successfully

criteria.name: Initial Condition Compression
criteria.requirement: IC compresses to QTT format in < 5 seconds
criteria.evidence: Compressed in 0.33s, omega rank=24, psi rank=1

criteria.name: Time-Stepping Stability
criteria.evidence: omega_core_max stable at ~182, psi_core_max stable at ~190 after 100 steps

criteria.name: Performance Target
criteria.evidence: 470ms per step achieved (2.1× better than requirement)

criteria.name: O(log N) Scaling
criteria.requirement: Time scales logarithmically with grid size
criteria.evidence: 256× cells (16K→4M) resulted in only 2× time increase

rank_reduction.rationale: HVAC flows are smooth, compress to low rank

fast_path_truncation.description: Skip SVD when bonds already below threshold
fast_path_truncation.impact: Eliminates unnecessary work on already-compressed states

cpu_execution.description: CPU preferred over GPU for QTT operations
cpu_execution.rationale: Kernel launch overhead defeats small tensor ops

poisson_solver.evidence: Streamfunction evolves but velocity recovery only 24% of inlet BC

velocity_recovery.evidence: v_max = 0.11 m/s vs inlet BC 0.455 m/s (24% recovery)
velocity_recovery.root_cause: Inlet BC not properly maintained through vorticity-streamfunction formulation

steady_state_solver.note: Industry-standard HVAC uses steady-state RANS, not transient

blockers: Inlet BC velocity recovery only 24% - must reach >90%
Need steady-state RANS solver (industry standard for HVAC)
Vorticity-streamfunction may be wrong formulation for wall-bounded flows
tier2_prerequisites.recommendation: Consider primitive variable (u,v,p) formulation or validated CFD backend
